name: STG · AI · Webhook → Operator Confidence Fallback Handler · DHR
description: AI | Called by Main Router when intent confidence < 0.7. Generates a clarifying question via Claude, stores it in operator_sessions, returns {type: clarification, message}. OWNER: Dhruv | p1:high | ai-powered | ENV: STG

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $vars.GLOBAL_AI_MODEL_DEFAULT || 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 80, system: 'You are a concise assistant. Respond with a single clarifying question only — no preamble, no explanation, no quotes. The question must be under 20 words and end with a question mark.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'The user sent this message: "' + $json.body.original_message + '"

Confidence score: ' + ($json.body.confidence || 0) + '

Top possible intents: ' + ($json.body.top_intents || []).map((t, i) => (i + 1) + '. ' + t).join(', ') + '

Generate one clarifying question to determine what the user needs. Under 20 words.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ clarification_sent: true, clarification_text: $json.clarification_text, last_confidence: $json.confidence, top_intents: $json.top_intents, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'clarification', message: $('Code - Extract Clarification Text').first().json.clarification_text, session_id: $('Code - Extract Clarification Text').first().json.session_id, confidence: $('Code - Extract Clarification Text').first().json.confidence }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: 'STG · AI · Webhook → Operator Confidence Fallback Handler · DHR', error_message: $json.error.message, error_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, execution_id: $execution.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
